title: Null pointer / None check missing
diff:
diff --git a/user_service.py b/user_service.py
--- a/user_service.py
+++ b/user_service.py
@@ -8,6 +8,8 @@ def get_user_profile(user_id):
     user = db.query(User).filter_by(id=user_id).first()
-    if user is None:
-        return None
-    return {"name": user.full_name, "email": user.email}
+    # Removed None check — will crash if user not found
+    return {"name": user.full_name, "email": user.email}

ground_truth.description: Missing null check: user may be None, causing AttributeError
